description: A production technician manages the injection of corrosion inhibitor into a subsea pipeline.

nodes.task_description: Check the current inventory level of the corrosion inhibitor in the topside chemical tank.

expected_outcome.value: The system reports the tank level is at 25%, nearing the reorder point.

nodes.task_description: Verify the chemical injection pump is operating correctly and at the desired rate.

expected_outcome.value: The pump's status and injection rate are confirmed to be normal.

nodes.task_description: Create a purchase requisition for a new supply of corrosion inhibitor.

expected_outcome.value: A purchase request is submitted to the procurement system.
